title: Era of Innovation
description: Era of Innovation is a Minecraft modpack that combines creativity, technology, and exploration. Featuring the 'Create' mod series, YUNG's enhanced structures, and immersive survival mechanics, it offers players a unique blend of engineering and adventure.
body:
Era of Innovation is a carefully crafted Minecraft modpack designed to inspire creativity and exploration. At its core is the 'Create' mod series, offering complex mechanical systems, automation, and stunning engineering possibilities. Complementing this are mods like Biomes O' Plenty and YUNG's Better Structures, which bring diverse landscapes and intricately enhanced structures to life.

Survival elements such as Tough As Nails and Serene Seasons add challenge and immersion, while quality-of-life mods like JEI, Jade, and Mouse Tweaks ensure smooth gameplay. Customizable aesthetics are provided by Macaw’s building mods, and additional adventures await with expanded dungeons, temples, and nether fortresses.

Whether you're designing a sprawling factory, surviving harsh environments, or exploring a richly enhanced world, Era of Innovation invites you to redefine what's possible in Minecraft. Perfect for builders, adventurers, and tinkerers alike!

**Included Mods and Attribution**
This modpack includes the following mod(s) that require attribution:

Mowzie's Mobs (v1.6.5)
For more information about this mod, visit the official CurseForge page: [Mowzie's Mobs](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mowzies-mobs).

FTB Chunks (Forge)
For more information about this mod, visit the official CurseForge page: [FTB Chunks (Forge)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ftb-chunks-forge)
